sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare stock plunges nearly 8% on weak volume trends despite Q1 beat
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) shares dropped nearly 8% despite the company reporting first-quarter results that slightly beat analyst expectations, with adjusted EPS of $7.15 and revenue of $19.11 billion. The stock's decline was attributed to weak volume trends, including a significant decrease in respiratory-related admissions and emergency room visits, and the absence of typical seasonal increases. The company reiterated its full-year 2026 guidance, projecting revenues between $76.5 billion and $80.0 billion, and adjusted EBITDA of $15.55 billion to $16.45 billion.

feed.title: [6-K] Real Brokerage Inc Current Report (Foreign Issuer) | REAX SEC Filing - Form 6-K
feed.summary: Real Brokerage Inc. (REAX) filed a Form 6-K, a current report for a foreign private issuer, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on April 24, 2026. The report indicates that the company will file annual reports under Form 40-F and includes its 2025 Annual Report as Exhibit 99.1. The filing was signed by Alexandra Lumpkin, Chief Legal Officer.

feed.title: RMIF Stock Fund Price and Chart — CBOE:RMIF
feed.summary: The RMIF (LHA Risk-Managed Income ETF) seeks current income by actively managing a portfolio of broad, fixed-income ETFs while managing risks. It invests in a variety of debt instruments and uses a discretionary allocation approach to adapt to changing market conditions, shifting to preserve capital in unfavorable markets or maximize income in favorable ones. The fund has assets under management of $26.52 million, an indicated dividend yield of 5.60%, and an expense ratio of 1.68%.

feed.title: Rosenblatt Securities Maintains Galaxy Digital(GLXY.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $39
feed.summary: Rosenblatt Securities has reiterated its Buy rating on Galaxy Digital (GLXY.US) and maintained its price target at $39. This indicates a continued positive outlook from the firm regarding the financial services and investment management company focused on digital assets.

feed.title: Dividend Roundup: Otis Worldwide, Eaton, AGNC Invest, Morgan Stanley, and more (VIG:NYSEARCA)
feed.summary: This article provides a brief dividend roundup for the week, highlighting increased payouts from companies like Metropolitan Bank and Otis Worldwide. It also mentions dividend declarations from M&T Bank and Eaton, and looks ahead to upcoming declarations from AGNC Invest. The article lists several related stock tickers and ETFs.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. $ODFL Shares Sold by Janney Montgomery Scott LLC
feed.summary: Janney Montgomery Scott LLC significantly decreased its holdings in Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (ODFL) by 61.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 59,583 shares and retaining 37,706 shares valued at approximately $5.91 million. This comes as company insiders also sold a total of 80,134 shares, though they still maintain about 10% ownership. Despite these sales, Old Dominion Freight Line reported Q4 EPS of $1.09, exceeding estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.29, with analysts largely issuing a "Hold" rating for the stock.

feed.title: Rakuten Securities Inc. Acquires 1,744 Shares of The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. $GS
feed.summary: Rakuten Securities Inc. increased its stake in The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. by 54.3% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 1,744 shares to hold a total of 4,957 shares valued at $4.357 million. This makes it Rakuten's 15th-largest position, representing about 1.4% of its investment portfolio. Goldman Sachs recently exceeded Q1 earnings estimates with $17.55 EPS and announced a quarterly dividend of $4.50 per share.

feed.title: Analog Devices, Inc. Hits New 52-Week High at USD 408.37
feed.summary: Analog Devices, Inc. has reached a new 52-week high of USD 408.37, driven by strong performance in the Other Electrical Equipment industry, significantly outperforming the S&P 500. The company boasts robust growth in net sales and operating profit, a healthy dividend yield, low debt-to-equity ratio, and high institutional holdings, underscoring its financial stability and investor confidence. This milestone reflects Analog Devices' solid market position and impressive financial health.

feed.title: Is the Amex Platinum Worth It if You Don't Travel Much? Here's the Honest Answer
feed.summary: The American Express Platinum Card, despite its high annual fee and reputation as a travel card, offers significant non-travel-related credits that can offset its cost. These credits, totaling up to $1,355, include dining, retail, digital entertainment, and Uber cash, making the card potentially worthwhile for non-travelers who can naturally utilize these benefits. However, its value diminishes if users have to alter their spending habits to redeem the credits.

feed.title: NBC Securities Inc. Has $3.20 Million Stock Position in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: NBC Securities Inc. significantly increased its stake in Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) by 47.5% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to $3.20 million. This move comes as Qualcomm's board authorized a $20 billion share buyback and raised its quarterly dividend, signaling strong shareholder returns. Despite these positive corporate actions, analyst opinions on Qualcomm are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $158.25 amidst both upgrades and downgrades from various brokers.

feed.title: Lebenthal Global Advisors LLC Acquires 15,096 Shares of Restaurant Brands International Inc. $QSR
feed.summary: Lebenthal Global Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Restaurant Brands International (NYSE:QSR) by 118.5% in Q4, purchasing 15,096 shares to hold a total of 27,831 shares valued at approximately $1.899 million. This comes despite corporate insiders being net sellers of the stock, including CFO Sami A. Siddiqui and Jill Granat. Restaurant Brands International also raised its quarterly dividend to $0.65, now yielding around 3.2%, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target price of $81.04.

feed.title: NBC Securities Inc. Has $3.42 Million Position in WEC Energy Group, Inc. $WEC
feed.summary: NBC Securities Inc. significantly increased its stake in WEC Energy Group, boosting its holdings by over 5,000% to 32,386 shares valued at approximately $3.42 million. WEC Energy Group posted a slight Q4 EPS beat and provided FY 2026 guidance that aligns with analyst expectations, maintaining a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $121.94. The company offers a 3.3% dividend yield, while insider activity shows recent sales totaling about $4.86 million.

feed.title: Caesars Launches Sportsbook at Ohio Racino Site
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment has opened a new retail sportsbook at Northfield Park Racino in Ohio, following MGM Resorts International's sale of the property. This new sportsbook offers in-person wagering with a large LED video wall, betting windows, and self-service kiosks, integrating with Caesars Rewards and its digital platform. This move expands Caesars' presence in Ohio, complementing their existing operations and mobile sportsbook services.

feed.title: SLB in charts: Q1 revenue rises 3% to $8.72B on broad growth, Middle East hit by disruptions
feed.summary: SLB reported a 3% increase in Q1 revenue to $8.72 billion, driven by broad international growth. While demand for its services remains strong globally, geopolitical disruptions and revised spending in the Middle East impacted results in that region. The company forecasts continued strong growth in 2024, particularly in international and offshore markets.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Raises Stock Position in Cummins Inc. $CMI
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC increased its stake in Cummins Inc. by 31.2% in the fourth quarter, now holding 7,021 shares worth approximately $3.58 million. Cummins recently outperformed quarterly earnings estimates, reporting $5.81 EPS against an expected $5.17 and achieving $8.54 billion in revenue. Despite a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with an average target of $600.27, company insiders have been net sellers, divesting about $18.4 million in shares over the past 90 days.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Purchases 3,196 Shares of Amgen Inc. $AMGN
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC increased its stake in Amgen Inc. by 31.8% in Q4, acquiring 3,196 additional shares to hold a total of 13,259 shares valued at $4.34 million. Amgen also reported strong Q4 earnings, beating revenue and EPS estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend of $2.52 per share with an annualized yield of 2.9%. The company maintains a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $356.62.

feed.title: NBC Securities Inc. Acquires 10,296 Shares of Gilead Sciences, Inc. $GILD
feed.summary: NBC Securities Inc. has significantly increased its stake in Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ:GILD) by purchasing an additional 10,296 shares, bringing their total holdings to 17,147 shares valued at $2.105 million. This coincides with Gilead beating its quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, and raising its dividend. Despite this institutional buying, several insiders, including the CEO, have sold shares of the biopharmaceutical company.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Has $3.91 Million Stock Holdings in EOG Resources, Inc. $EOG
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in EOG Resources, Inc. during Q4, now holding 37,215 shares valued at $3.91 million. Despite several analyst price target increases, the stock maintains a consensus "Hold" rating. EOG Resources recently reported strong Q1 earnings, beating estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.02 per share.

feed.title: Is HCA Healthcare (HCA) Overvalued After Q1 2026 EPS Miss and Revenue Beat?
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare Inc. reported mixed Q1 2026 results, with diluted EPS missing estimates at $7.15 against an estimated $7.18, but revenue beating expectations at $19.109 billion. Despite facing atypical seasonality and weather headwinds, the company saw a 4.3% year-over-year revenue increase and a 22% rise in operating cash flow. GuruFocus deems HCA overvalued, with a GF Value of $431.18 versus a current price of $474.03, highlighting concerns about its leverage and insider selling.

feed.title: Equifax’s new bank tools target high spenders and low-risk borrowers
feed.summary: Equifax partnered with Ataeva to launch the Ataeva Product Suite, which includes Ataeva TAPS℠ and Ataeva CYM℠. These tools utilize over 100 FCRA-regulated attributes and up to 12 months of trended consumer credit data to help financial institutions identify high-spending, low-risk borrowers and optimize portfolio performance. The suite aims to enhance customer acquisition, pre-screening, and retention strategies for banks, credit unions, and card issuers.

feed.title: The Real Brokerage Files Form 6-K to Furnish 2025 Annual Report
feed.summary: The Real Brokerage Inc. filed a Form 6-K with the SEC on April 24, 2026, to provide its 2025 Annual Report to U.S. investors, fulfilling its foreign issuer disclosure requirements. This filing enhances transparency for shareholders and analysts. While the stock has a "Buy" rating from analysts with a $4.25 price target, TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rates REAX as "Neutral" due to strong fundamentals and liquidity offset by weak technicals and ongoing GAAP losses.

feed.title: Phillips 66 To Rally More Than 9%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Friday
feed.summary: This article compiles the top 10 analyst rating changes for various companies, including upgrades, downgrades, and price target adjustments. Notable shifts include Morgan Stanley upgrading Phillips 66 (PSX) to Overweight with a raised price target and Needham increasing Applied Digital Corp's (APLD) price target to $48. Conversely, DraftKings Inc (DKNG) was downgraded to Neutral by MoffettNathanson, and Insulet Corp (PODD) saw a significant price target cut from Rothschild & Co.

feed.title: Invesco SteelPath MLP & Energy Infrastructure ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.0900
feed.summary: The Invesco SteelPath MLP & Energy Infrastructure ETF has declared a monthly distribution of $0.0900 per share. This declaration provides investors with a consistent income stream from its holdings in MLP and energy infrastructure assets.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Boosts Stock Position in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC increased its stake in Qualcomm Incorporated by 31.9% in Q4, acquiring an additional 4,257 shares to own a total of 17,617 shares valued at approximately $3.01 million. The article highlights Qualcomm's recent financial actions, including a $20 billion share repurchase authorization and an increased quarterly dividend of $0.92 per share, yielding about 2.7%. Despite beating earnings and revenue estimates in its latest quarter, the company faces mixed analyst sentiment, with an average "Hold" rating and concerns about handset demand.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Ohio Bills Could Rise Up To $5 A Month As May 22 Rate Filing Nears
feed.summary: FirstEnergy's Ohio utilities are preparing to file a three-year rate plan by May 22, which could increase monthly bills for average residential customers by $4 to $5. This proposal is a significant test for Ohio's new forward-looking ratemaking law, allowing utilities to price future grid investments. The plan aims to fund approximately $800 million annually for infrastructure upgrades and tree trimming, and comes amid recent storm-cost adjustments and regulatory penalties for FirstEnergy.

feed.title: Members Wealth LLC Sells 21,787 Shares of RB Global, Inc. $RBA
feed.summary: Members Wealth LLC significantly reduced its stake in RB Global, Inc. by selling 21,787 shares, leaving them with 6,515 shares valued at $670,000. Despite this sale, institutional ownership remains high at 95.37%, with several funds increasing their positions. Analysts are generally bullish on RB Global, maintaining an average "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $125.13, following the company's recent earnings beat.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Stock Rises on Earnings. It Shook Off a ‘Challenging’ Backdrop.
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble's stock rose on Friday following the announcement of better-than-expected quarterly earnings. The consumer packaged goods company demonstrated resilience despite a challenging economic environment, leading to a positive market reaction.

feed.title: Zacks Research Has Optimistic Outlook of RPM FY2026 Earnings
feed.summary: Zacks Research has increased its FY2026 EPS estimate for RPM International to $5.46, up from $5.24, while maintaining a "Hold" rating on the stock. This projection is slightly higher than the consensus estimate of $5.43 per share. RPM recently surpassed quarterly earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $0.57 against an anticipated $0.37 and revenue of $1.61 billion compared to an expected $1.55 billion.

feed.title: Q2 Earnings Forecast for Freightcar America Issued By Sidoti
feed.summary: Sidoti has

feed.title: Picard Medical revenue up 79.9% to USD 1.1M in Q1 2026
feed.summary: Picard Medical, Inc. announced preliminary, unaudited top-line revenues of $1.1 million for Q1 2026, marking a 79.9% increase from the previous year. This growth was attributed to higher utilization of the SynCardia Total Artificial Heart and increased driver rental income, driven by favorable reimbursement and economic conditions in the United States, along with pricing adjustments to their rental program. The company expects to file its full financial results by May 15, 2026.

feed.title: Ponce Financial grows loans and deposits as Q1 profit hits $8.6M
feed.summary: Ponce Financial Group reported a Q1 2026 net income of $8.6 million, with diluted EPS of $0.36, driven by a 27.13% year-over-year increase in net interest income to $28.2 million and a net interest margin of 3.61%. The company saw significant balance sheet growth, with net loans rising 3.82% quarter-over-quarter to $2.70 billion and deposits increasing 4.26% to $2.13 billion, while non-performing assets decreased. Despite a quarter-over-quarter dip in net income due to lower non-interest income and higher credit provisions, Ponce Financial maintained strong capital ratios and continued its positive historical earnings trend.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare Posts Solid Q1 Results, Reaffirms 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare reported solid first-quarter 2026 results with modest revenue and profit growth despite softer volumes, reaffirming its full-year 2026 guidance. The company saw revenue rise 4.3% to $19.1 billion, and net income increased to $1.62 billion, driven by improved pricing and mix. HCA generated robust cash flow, supporting significant capital expenditures, share buybacks, and a higher dividend, while an AI analyst from TipRanks rated the stock as "Outperform."

feed.title: HCA HEALTHCARE ($HCA) Releases Q1 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: HCA HEALTHCARE ($HCA) announced its Q1 2026 earnings, reporting $7.15 per share and revenues of $19.109 billion, both missing analyst estimates. The article also details recent insider trading activity, showing significant sales by executives, as well as institutional investor movements in HCA stock. Analyst ratings and price targets are also provided, with a majority of firms issuing "Buy" or "Overweight" ratings.

feed.title: Aetna says 95% of eligible care approvals clear within 24 hours
feed.summary: Aetna announced significant progress in simplifying its prior authorization process, with 88% of volume standardized and over 95% of eligible requests approved within 24 hours. The company also reported processing 83% of prior authorizations in real-time and eliminating over 1 million provider calls through automation. Aetna is integrating medical and pharmacy decisions into single reviews and launching bundled programs to streamline approvals further.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Purchases 1,374 Shares of Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC increased its stake in Caterpillar Inc. by 30.9% in the fourth quarter, acquiring an additional 1,374 shares to reach a total of 5,819 shares valued at approximately $3.33 million. This increase occurred despite recent insider selling by executives like Rodney Michael Shurman and Bob De Lange, totaling around $88.6 million in the last 90 days. Caterpillar reported strong earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.51 per share, with analysts maintaining a mostly bullish outlook.

feed.title: SLB Profit Falls as Iran War Disrupts Operations, Clouds Outlook
feed.summary: SLB's first-quarter profit has decreased due to widespread disruptions in the Middle East, which CEO Olivier Le Peuch described as a challenging start to the year. The oilfield-services company had to demobilize operations in several countries to ensure the safety of personnel and facilities.

feed.title: Geneos Wealth Management Inc. Acquires 2,572 Shares of Caterpillar Inc. $CAT
feed.summary: Geneos Wealth Management Inc. increased its stake in Caterpillar Inc. by 18.8% in Q4, acquiring an additional 2,572 shares to bring its total holdings to 16,261 shares valued at $9.316 million. This increased institutional interest comes despite recent insider selling by top executives, who offloaded 125,950 shares worth $88.58 million. Caterpillar reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates and achieving a 17.9% increase in revenue, leading to analyst upgrades and an average price target of $767.77.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Makes New Investment in Amcor PLC $AMCR
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC has made a new investment in Amcor PLC (NYSE:AMCR), purchasing 271,413 shares valued at approximately $2.26 million. This new position represents about 0.06% of Amcor's stock. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Real Brokerage Sets May 29 Virtual AGM and Files 2026 Meeting Materials on Form 6-K
feed.summary: Real Brokerage has announced its virtual Annual General Meeting (AGM) for May 29, 2026, after circulating 2026 proxy materials to shareholders of record as of April 2, 2026. The company is leveraging notice-and-access rules for digital distribution of materials and has filed a Form 6-K incorporating these materials into its U.S. registration statements. While a recent analyst rating suggests a "Buy" with a $4.25 price target, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates REAX as Neutral, citing strong fundamentals but weak technicals and valuation constraints.

feed.title: Omnicom Group Inc. $OMC Shares Bought by Kerusso Capital Management LLC
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) by 149.1% in Q4, bringing its total holdings to 39,488 shares valued at approximately $3.19 million. Institutional investors collectively own about 91.97% of the company, which recently approved a $5.0 billion share buyback program and pays a quarterly dividend of $0.80. Despite a mixed analyst outlook and recent earnings and revenue misses, the company's stock has an average "Hold" rating with an average target price of $95.86.

feed.title: Perpetua Resources (NASDAQ: PPTA) plans 2026 virtual AGM and new equity incentive plan
feed.summary: Perpetua Resources (NASDAQ: PPTA) is preparing for its 2026 annual general meeting (AGM) on June 4, 2026, which will be held virtually. Shareholders will vote on key proposals including setting the Board size at nine directors, electing nine incumbent nominees, approving the 2026 Equity Incentive Plan, and ratifying PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as independent auditors. The new equity plan maintains the existing 8,280,530-share reserve, and the company highlights its strong governance and ESG performance, including zero reportable spills and lost-time incidents in 2025.

feed.title: Roper Technologies (ROP) Margin Decline Tests Bullish AI Growth Narrative Heading Into Q1 2026
feed.summary: Roper Technologies reported Q1 2026 results with Q4 2025 revenue of US$2,058.6 million and EPS of US$4.00, but trailing net profit margins eased from 22% to 19.4%. This margin decline tests the bullish narrative centered on AI growth, with bears pointing to higher costs and integration risks. Despite this, the company's valuation still shows potential upside against analyst targets and DCF fair value.

feed.title: Kerusso Capital Management LLC Decreases Position in The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: Kerusso Capital Management LLC reduced its stake in The TJX Companies, Inc. by 24.4% in the fourth quarter of the prior year, selling 6,749 shares and retaining 20,890 shares valued at approximately $3.21 million. Despite this reduction, institutional investors collectively own about 91.09% of TJX stock. The company reported strong Q4 results, beating estimates, issued positive FY-2027 EPS guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: SLB Stock Tumbles on Earnings as CEO Cites ‘Challenging Start to the Year’
feed.summary: SLB's stock fell after its CEO, Olivier Le Peuch, stated the company is facing a "challenging start to the year." This comes despite earlier claims that struggles in key regions were over, indicating that the oilfield services provider continues to face difficulties, particularly due to disruptions in the Middle East.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase adds Matthews to its growing list of Charlotte-area branches
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase is continuing its expansion in the Charlotte market by adding a new branch in Matthews. This new location contributes to the bank's rapid retail growth, which has established a significant local presence with approximately 28 operating branches and plans for at least 15 more by the end of 2027, just six years after entering the market.

feed.title: Travelers Tests AI Distribution With Simply Business Small Business App
feed.summary: Travelers Companies, through its subsidiary Simply Business, has launched an AI-powered insurance app on ChatGPT for small businesses in the US, aimed at streamlining the quoting process. This initiative represents Travelers' move into digital distribution in commercial lines and a strategic test of AI at the front of the customer acquisition funnel. While the commercial impact is yet TBD, it aligns with Travelers' focus on analytics, underwriting technology, and disciplined risk selection.

feed.title: Is CMS Energy (CMS) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Softness?
feed.summary: CMS Energy's stock has shown recent softness, declining 1.9% over the past 7 days, but returning 8.8% year-to-date and 6.5% over the last year. Simply Wall St's valuation checks score CMS Energy at 2 out of 6, with a Dividend Discount Model suggesting it's about 9.1% overvalued, and its P/E ratio aligns closely with its proprietary "Fair Ratio," indicating it's broadly fairly priced. The article encourages investors to use "Narratives" for personalized valuation analysis, linking assumptions to forecasts and fair value.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare (NYSE: HCA) Q1 2026 results, dividend and buybacks
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare reported a modest 4.3% revenue increase to $19.109 billion and a slight 0.6% rise in net income to $1.620 billion for Q1 2026. Diluted EPS grew 10.9% to $7.15 due to share repurchases. The company affirmed its full-year 2026 guidance, declared a quarterly dividend of $0.78 per share, and demonstrated strong cash generation ($2.014 billion from operations) with significant capital deployment in buybacks and expenditures.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (HCA) HCA Healthcare, Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $19.11B, vs. FactSet Est of $19.09B
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. reported its Q1 revenue reached $19.11 billion, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $19.09 billion. This news was published on April 24, 2026, at 07:10 AM EDT, indicating a positive financial performance for the company. The healthcare provider's revenue beat suggests strong demand for its medical care services.

feed.title: Real Brokerage (NASDAQ: REAX) details 2026 virtual AGM, board nominees and pay
feed.summary: The Real Brokerage Inc. has announced details for its 2026 Annual General Meeting (AGM) of Shareholders, scheduled virtually for May 29, 2026. Shareholders will vote on fixing the Board size at nine directors, electing the nominated slate, and re-appointing auditors. The company also disclosed key financial figures, including shareholdings and 2025 executive compensation details.
